overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion) showing first-person exploration of the Imperial City Temple interior, transitioning to outdoor cobblestone streets at night, and entering a residential house. The clip features gothic architecture, lantern-lit streets, and interior spaces with vaulted ceilings.

events.description: camera tilts down from dome ceiling to floor level

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the ornate domed ceiling with stone ribs and central oculus

entered.detail: large circular domed ceiling with geometric stone ribbing pattern
circular window at the apex of the dome showing night sky
radiating structural ribs supporting the dome ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking straight up at a grand domed ceiling with stone ribs and a central oculus window. The camera slowly tilts down, revealing the interior of a gothic temple with marble floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple nave with massive stone columns

events.description: approaches and exits through the arched stone doorway to the outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular temple interior, navigating between large stone columns toward the exit

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking across the temple floor from left to right

entered.detail: massive fluted stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall arched windows with circular patterned panes emitting blue light
ornate red patterned carpets laid on the stone floor
stone archway leading to the exterior of the temple

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the temple interior, passing between massive stone columns and stained glass windows. A robed NPC walks across the path, and the player approaches a large arched doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: lantern-lit cobblestone city street at night

events.description: emerges from dim interior to night scene with warm lantern lighting
approaches the wooden door of a residential house

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street between stone buildings, passing wall-mounted lanterns

entered.detail: tall historic stone structures with arched windows and weathered facades
warm glowing lanterns mounted on building walls illuminating the street
curved cobblestone pavement forming the city street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the temple, the scene transitions to a dark cobblestone street at night. The camera walks past stone buildings illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns, navigating the curved street toward a wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential house interior with vaulted ceiling

events.description: opens wooden door and enters the house interior
ascends the stone staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: entering the house and exploring the interior, examining the main hall and ascending the staircase

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt standing near a wooden table inside the house

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs leading into the residence
stone staircase with wooden steps leading to an upper floor
hanging candle chandelier illuminating the room
decorative woven tapestry hanging on the stone wall
wooden tables, chairs, and benches arranged in the living space

segments.scene_description: The player enters a residential house through a wooden door, revealing a spacious interior with vaulted ceilings, stone stairs, and wooden furniture. An NPC in a red shirt stands near a table as the player explores the ground floor and ascends the staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins within the soaring heights of a gothic temple and transitions into the intimate interior of a residential home at night. It begins by looking straight up at a grand domed ceiling with a central oculus before tilting down to reveal marble floors and massive stone columns. As the camera moves past stained glass windows and a robed figure, it passes through a large arched doorway, shifting the environment from the temple's grandeur to a dark, cobblestone street illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns. The scene then follows the curve of the road toward a wooden door, which opens to reveal a spacious house with vaulted ceilings and stone stairs. Finally, the camera explores the ground floor past an NPC in a red shirt before ascending the staircase into the upper level.
